name: Onion Cheddar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour and yeast.
3. Add warm water, orange juice, water, butter/margarine, onion soup mix, sugar, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until a dough forms.
5. Cut the melted butter into small pieces and fold them into the dough.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese on top of the dough.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
